mnemonics: MINERVA: Mini Neural Engine Recognizing Intelligent Natural Vectors And Rules Vision Always
NLP: Natural Language Processing for Game Playing, the Next Level
keyPoints: Game Trees: A tree-like structure used to represent possible moves and outcomes in game playing AI
Minimax Algorithm: A recursive algorithm used to determine the best move by considering all possible moves and their outcomes
Natural Language Processing: The ability of computers to understand, interpret, and generate human language
